name: Justin
description: A 30-20-10 triplet of back squat, bench press, and strict pull-up — three foundational strength movements at a shared descending rep scheme.
source_notes: crossfit.com/benchmark/justin (official CrossFit Hero WOD page), retrieved 2026-07-09; official page lists no barbell load for back squat/bench press (conventionally performed at bodyweight)
